description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved docetaxel in combination with carboplatin, trastuzumab (s/c), and pertuzumab (tch(s/c)p) therapy for reimbursement as a treatment option for the neoadjuvant treatment of HER2-positive locally advanced, inflammatory, or early breast cancer at high risk of recurrence in adult patients.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

indication.description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved docetaxel in combination with carboplatin, trastuzumab (s/c), and pertuzumab (tch(s/c)p) therapy for reimbursement as a treatment option for the neoadjuvant treatment of HER2-positive locally advanced, inflammatory, or early breast cancer at high risk of recurrence in adult patients.
